summary: End-to-end testing of Quiz d'Antan SaaS (backend + frontend). All 25 pytest backend tests passing (100%). Frontend flows verified: landing page (hero, 6 category cards, mascots, demo quiz, pricing), registration → dashboard, logout, admin login (shows 'BONJOUR ADMINISTRATEUR'), dashboard with 6 categories + stats + upgrade CTA for free users, quiz player (question/4 options/feedback/next/speak), Stripe checkout redirect to checkout.stripe.com confirmed (€9.99 sandbox session). 6 mascot PNGs served correctly. Free vs Premium gating works (free=5 max, premium=20).

issues: data-testid='demo-feedback' wrapper not detected as visible by selector; feedback text 'Bonne réponse'/explanation actually rendered (verified via body text). Consider explicitly tagging the feedback container with data-testid='demo-feedback' for robust automated testing.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid='demo-feedback' to the demo quiz feedback container on Landing.jsx for easier automated assertions (currently the feedback text renders but the wrapper has no testid).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 477 lines — acceptable for an MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth/quiz/payments) before further growth.
Stripe webhook signature verification relies on emergentintegrations.handle_webhook; ensure STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is configured before production (currently no env var present).

Default fallbacks for ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD/JWT_SECRET when not set could mask misconfiguration in production — JWT_SECRET is correctly required (os.environ[...]); ADMIN_* still fall back to defaults which is OK for seed but should be documented.

/api/categories/{id}/questions returns correct_index in payload — fine for an MVP/SPA but technically allows a malicious client to read the answer before submitting. Score is also computed and trusted on client side via POST /api/attempts (server doesn't validate).
POST /api/attempts accepts any score/total values from client without server-side validation against actual questions — potential cheating vector. Acceptable for MVP gamification but worth noting.
CORS allow_origins includes 'http://localhost:3000' hardcoded — acceptable for dev convenience.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@quizdantan.fr / Admin2026! (premium, lifetime). Free users registered dynamically per test run with timestamped emails.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 6 categories + 24 questions on startup. 6 mascot PNGs already present in /app/backend/static/mascots/. No manual seeding needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and cover health, categories, packages, static mascots, auth (login/register/me/logout/duplicate), quiz gating (free=5/premium=20/404), attempts+stats, Stripe checkout (auth, invalid pkg, monthly+yearly redirect URLs). Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend cookies use samesite=none secure=true so requests.Session preserves them fine. Admin user is premium so pricing page disables buy buttons for them — to test Stripe redirect from UI use a freshly registered free user.
